01BA:A676.label: xms_move_block
01BA:A676.comment: Copy words to/from extended memory via BIOS INT 15h/87h. Params on stack: dest addr (bp-0Eh/bp-0Ch), src addr (bp-12h/bp-10h), word count (bp-02h/bp-04h).

01BA:A7BE.label: rotate_descriptor_words
01BA:A7BE.comment: Left-rotate 3 words at [BX]: new[0]=old[2], new[2]=old[4], new[4]=old[0].

lineComments.01BA:A683: swap new dest XMS addr (AX=low, DL=high) with static transfer state at [A656]/[A658]
lineComments.01BA:A68D: swap new src XMS addr (CX=low, DH=high) with static transfer state at [A644]/[A646]
lineComments.01BA:A69D: inc transfer counter; if wrapped to 0, skip normal descriptor update
lineComments.01BA:A6C2: CS: 0F 01 — LGDT or LIDT (descriptor table load; bytes not fully decoded)
lineComments.01BA:A6CC: rotate GDT descriptor words for dest at [A668]
lineComments.01BA:A6D5: rotate GDT descriptor words for src at [A65C]
lineComments.01BA:A6D8: clamp transfer count to max 0x7FFF words (INT 15h/87h limit)
lineComments.01BA:A6EB: GDT segment: physical 0x0080*16 = 0x800 (where BIOS expects GDT for INT 15h/87h)
lineComments.01BA:A6F5: mov es, bx — ES = 01BA (disasm shows 'mov bx'; opcode 8E C3 = mov es, bx)
lineComments.01BA:A6FB: save SP so XMS transfer can restore stack after protected-mode switch
lineComments.01BA:A700: hardcoded save of DS=1BB5 (caller's data segment)
lineComments.01BA:A70A: mov ds, ax — DS = 0080 (GDT segment; disasm shows 'mov ax'; opcode 8E D8)
lineComments.01BA:A70E: save current BIOS GDT area (102 bytes: DS:0000 → ES:A5A8)
lineComments.01BA:A712: mov es, ax — ES = 0080 (GDT segment; disasm shows 'mov ax'; opcode 8E C0)
lineComments.01BA:A717: mov ds, bx — DS = 01BA (disasm shows 'mov bx'; opcode 8E DB)
lineComments.01BA:A71B: install XMS transfer GDT (102 bytes: 01BA:A60E → 0080:DI) for INT 15h/87h

gaps.01BA:A6A4: normal-path descriptor updates; protected-mode instructions not decoded by disassembler
gaps.01BA:A71D: INT 15h/87h extended-memory block copy, followed by GDT restore, segment restore, and return
